perturbed_task_language: Pick the cream cheese and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: Object positions swapped; localized cream cheese (small flat blue Philadelphia box) and basket purely from depth back-projection.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 baseline tends to pick at memorized base location; perception hybrid finds the cream cheese visually.
strategy_notes: Identified target by spatial relation + visual: scanned world_00.npy for elevated z (>0.015) clusters and matched colors to LIBERO sprites. Two flat boxes (z~0.02) were candidates: comp7 (blue Philly label) at world(-0.113, -0.237, 0.021) and comp10 (orange BUTTER label) at world(0.156, 0.028, 0.020). Blue Philadelphia label confirmed comp7 as cream_cheese via wrist cam at step 01 (image_wrist_01 showed 'Cream' label). Refined coords with wrist cam: world(-0.116, -0.234, 0.019). Basket walls measured at world x=[-0.065,0.089], y=[0.181,0.352] → TRUE basket center (0.012, 0.266). First attempt released at (0.078, 0.266, 0.22) — FAR FRONT RIM, box wedged. Reset and re-released at TRUE center (0.020, 0.266, 0.18) — succeeded.
